caption: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair and black-rimmed glasses speaks against a plain black background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic with an embroidered neckline and a dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. Across the frames, she maintains a steady posture while gesturing with her hands, which are raised in front of her chest. Her mouth moves as she speaks, showing subtle changes in facial expression. In the bottom corner of each frame, a small gold circular logo is visible next to the white capitalized text "NPTEL". The lighting remains consistent, focusing on the woman while the background stays completely dark. There is no other equipment or people visible in the scene.
